data.question: Which employees (identified by id and name) have a name containing Haley?
data.sql_query_ref: select id, name from employees where name like '%Haley%'

data.question: Wich employees have the project with id P821?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id where projects.id='P821'

data.question: What is the average experience over all employees?
data.sql_query_ref: select avg(years) from experience

data.question: What is the full contact information for staff member Sara Rivera?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name,address.street,address.city,location.country,location.state,contact.email,contact.phone from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on contact.profile_id = profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.id join location on address_id=address.id where employees.name='Sara Rivera'

data.question: Wich employees do not have verified certifications?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.id, employees.name from meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where meta.verified=0

data.question: Wich employees live in the State Texas id: TX
data.sql_query_ref: select  employees.name, employees.id from location join address on address_id=address.id join contact on contact_id=contact.id join profile on profile_id=profile.id join employees on employees_id=employees.id where state='TX'

data.question: Which employees live outside the USA?
data.sql_query_ref: select  employees.name, employees.id from location join address on address_id=address.id join contact on contact_id=contact.id join profile on profile_id=profile.id join employees on employees_id=employees.id where country<>'USA'

data.question: How many projects are in the different states?
data.sql_query_ref: select state, count(*) from (select projects.id, projects.name,(select location.state from location join address on address_id=address.id join contact c on contact_id=c.id where c.profile_id=profile.id) as state from meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id) group by state

data.question: Which employees have no skill in JavaScript?
data.sql_query_ref: select name from employees where not id in (select employees.id from meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where skills."primary"='JavaScript' or exists(select * from secondary s  where s.value='JavaScript' and s.skills_id=skills.id))

data.question: Which employees have current certifications as AWS Solutions Architect and Scrum Master?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id  join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where exists( select * from current cu  where cu.certifications_id=certifications.id and value='AWS Solutions Architect') and exists( select * from current cu  where cu.certifications_id=certifications.id and value='Scrum Master')

data.question: Wich employee has primary skills in C++ and more then 4 years experience?
data.sql_query_ref: select name  from employees where id in (select employees.id from  meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where skills."primary"='C++' and years>4)

data.question: In which tasks does infrastructure appear?
data.sql_query_ref: select tasks.id,tasks.description from  meta join  certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join  skills on skills_id=skills.id join  assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join  projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where tasks.description like '%infrastructure%'

data.question: Name the first 10 employees in alphabetical order who have 5 years or less of experience.
data.sql_query_ref: select name from employees  where id in (select employees.id from  meta join  certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join  skills on skills_id=skills.id join  assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join  projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where years<=5) order by name limit 10

data.question: Please give me a list of all differnt expired certifications.
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct value from expired

data.question: Wich employees have an expired certification of CompTIA Security+
data.sql_query_ref: select name from employees where id in (select employees.id from  meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join  skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where exists(select * from expired b where b.certifications_id=certifications.id and b.value='CompTIA Security+'))

data.question: Wich employee has an email address at example.com?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on contact.profile_id = profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.id join location on address_id=address.id where contact.email like '%@example.com'

data.question: I need the name and id of all employees having  Smith in there name?
data.sql_query_ref: select name from employees where name like '%Smith%'

data.question: Which employees (use id and name) have no experience in DevOps?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.id, employees.name from meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where not exists( select * from domains dom where dom.experience_id=experience.id and dom.value='DevOps')

data.question: Suggest employee names having primariy skills in Java and 8 years of experience.
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from meta join certifications on certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id where skills."primary"='Java' and experience.years=8

data.question: In wich cities more than one employee work?
data.sql_query_ref: select address.city from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on contact.profile_id = profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.id join  location on address_id=address.id   group by address.city having count(*)>1

data.question: How many tasks are there in total?
data.sql_query_ref: select count(*) from tasks

data.question: Wich is the oldest date when the certificate was updated
data.sql_query_ref: select min(lastUpdated) from meta

data.question: I need all differnt task descriptions.
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct(description) from tasks

data.question: How many differnt secondary skills exists?
data.sql_query_ref: select count(*) from (select distinct value from secondary)

data.question: What different current certifications do employees with experience in the field of AI possess?
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct current.value from meta join certifications on meta.certifications_id=certifications.id join experience on experience_id=experience.id join skills on skills_id=skills.id join assignedTo on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join tasks on tasks_id=tasks.id join projects on  projects_id= projects.id join profile on profile_id=profile.Id join employees on  employees_id=employees.id join current on   current.certifications_id=certifications.id where exists(  select * from domains where domains.experience_id=experience.id and domains.value='AI')
